title: AI Fullstack Developer
company_focus:
AI solutions for business transformation and process
optimization
description:
Unlock Your Future with Nexaminds!

At Nexaminds, we're on a mission to redefine industries with
AI. We're passionate about the limitless potential of
artificial intelligence to transform businesses, streamline
processes, and drive growth.

Join us on our visionary journey. We're leading the way in
AI solutions, and we're committed to innovation,
collaboration, and ethical practices. Become a part of our
team and shape the future powered by intelligent machines.
If you're driven by ambition, success, fun, and learning,
Nexaminds is where you belong.

Looking for an experienced AI Full Stack Engineer who can
design, build, and manage intelligent, production-grade
systems. This role goes beyond traditional full-stack
development and includes prompt management, AI model
integration, API orchestration, and scalable system
development.

The ideal candidate is inquisitive, research-oriented, and
capable of forming fact-based technical opinions to guide
architecture and product decisions.

Key Responsibilities

- Design and develop AI-enabled full-stack applications using
  modern frameworks
- Implement and manage prompt engineering and prompt lifecycle
  management
- Integrate AI models via APIs (LLMs and related services)
  into production systems
- Build scalable backend services using NestJS and frontend
  applications using NextJS
- Manage model interaction layers, API orchestration, and
  system workflows
- Perform self-reviews and code reviews, even while using AI-
  enhanced IDEs
- Troubleshoot and independently resolve NPM, Git, and build-
  related issues
- Research new tools, frameworks, and AI approaches and
  provide data-driven recommendations
- Collaborate with product and engineering teams to align
  technical direction with business goals

Required Skills & Experience

- 5–7 years of hands-on full-stack development experience
- Strong expertise in TypeScript
- Proven experience with NextJS (frontend) and NestJS
  (backend)
- Familiarity with Python, React, Supabase, and Pinecone
  (preferred, not mandatory)
- Experience with API integration and service-oriented
  architectures
- Exposure to AI/LLM-based systems, prompt engineering, or
  model integration
- Strong understanding of software architecture and system
  design
- Comfortable using AI-assisted development tools, with the
  ability to critically review output
- Solid working knowledge of Git, NPM, and dependency
  management

Desired Attributes

- Highly inquisitive and research-driven mindset
- Ability to work independently and manage own development
  environment
- Strong problem-solving and debugging skills
- Clear communication and ability to justify technical
  decisions with facts

What you can expect from us

Here at Nexaminds, we're not your typical workplace. We're
all about creating a friendly and trusting environment where
you can thrive. Why does this matter? Well, trust and
openness lead to better quality, innovation, commitment to
getting the job done, efficiency, and cost-effectiveness.

- Stock options 📈
- Remote work options 🏠
- Flexible working hours 🕜
- Benefits above the law
- But it's not just about the work; it's about the people too.
  You'll be collaborating with some seriously awesome IT
  pros.
- You'll have access to mentorship and tons of opportunities
  to learn and level up.

Ready to embark on this journey with us? 🚀🎉 If you're
feeling the excitement, go ahead and apply!

use_cases: AI-enabled web applications for business transformation
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building AI-enabled applications
with prompt engineering, prompt lifecycle management, and
LLM API integration. The position requires hands-on work
implementing AI models into production systems and managing
model interaction layers, which is core AI/ML work rather
than support infrastructure.
